description_en: Since its founding in 1993, the Taiwan UFOlogy Society has used scientific methods to record and analyze UFO sighting events. Browse our latest news and case database, or share your own observations with us through our sighting report system.
title_en: Exploring the Unsolved Mysteries of Space
title: 探索太空未解之謎
description: 台灣飛碟學會自1993年成立以來，持續以科學方法記錄與分析不明飛行物目擊事件。歡迎瀏覽最新消息、案例資料庫，並透過目擊通報系統與我們分享您的觀測經驗。
